title: Ternary Universal Transformer — 15.6MB, bfloat16, Muon optimizerAdd ternary Universal Transformer submission
author: alons23
body: 68M-param Universal Transformer with ternary weights {-1,0,+1}, Muon optimizer, QK-Norm, RoPE, FlashAttention-2, bfloat16. NB=4 blocks x NR=6 recurrences = 24 effective layers. Artifact size: ~15.6MB. Test run val_bpb ~0.810 on 1xH100.
